title: YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide

decision.reflection: As a Devout Anatolian Loyalist, I react to YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide through my existing identity, media exposure, and lived pressures.

visible_broadcasts.paraphrased_message: Procedural integrity is required; whoever wins Istanbul wins Turkey — patriotic vigilance demands a rerun.
Endorse the AKP candidate; defend national unity against opposition collusion with the PKK.
The choice is between continued one-man rule and a democratic restart.
Strategic non-candidacy was the right call; defend the result.
Defend the vote — the rerun is a test of whether elections still mean anything.
